svg.title: journey diagram
svg.desc: A user journey diagram with 7 nodes and 6 edges. organized in 2 groups. flowing top to bottom. Key nodes: Visit homepage, Search products, View product.. Key relationships: Visit homepage connects to Search products; Search products connects to View product; View product connects to Add to cart.. Layout spans 2110 by 274 units with 7 rendered node boxes and 6 routed edge paths.

text.font-family: 'Inter', -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif
